description: Format the research narrative from ~/Documents/TextDocuments/research_strategy_raw.txt into a compliant NIH R01 grant proposal document. The final document must have 0.5-inch margins on all sides and use 11pt Arial font for the body text. Include a right-aligned header with the text 'PI: Smith, John'. For the sections 'Specific Aims', 'Significance', 'Innovation', and 'Approach', remove the '[SECTION]' tags and format the titles as bold and italic. Under the 'Innovation' section, convert the tab-separated data into a 4x3 table. Save the completed document as ~/Documents/TextDocuments/nih_r01_research_strategy.docx.
